tasks.name: Triage: P0 comms + VIN visibility requirement (bundle)
tasks.description:
- [ ] (10m) Ask Sahana where “the backlog” lives + what to use for intake (single source of truth link)
- [ ] (10m) Capture intake expectations: who files, what fields, what cadence
- [ ] (20m) Draft desired roadmap categories (simple + mutually exclusive) + 2–3 examples each
- [ ] (10m) Send categories to Sahana with examples of where common items should land
- [ ] (10m) Locate Sahana’s Precision Pricing PRD + best insertion point for VIN visibility requirement
- [ ] (20m) Write crisp requirement note: what must be visible (VIN), where (UI surfaces), and why (prevents recurring issue)
- [ ] (10m) Add acceptance-style bullets + edge cases
- [ ] (10m) Share note with Sahana (tag) + ask for PRD update acknowledgement
- [ ] (10m) Save backlog link + categorization guidance somewhere you’ll reuse

tasks.name: Triage: QSQ adherence analysis (#1) — pull + join + baseline cuts
tasks.description:
- [ ] (15m) Pull last 14–28 days from Gold Standard (fields listed in notes)
- [ ] (25m) Identify/confirm quote event source + join key (submission_id) + define “quoted” flag
- [ ] (25m) Compute adherence overall + by UW + by program
- [ ] (25m) Add segment proxies: state + exposure bands + premium/price band (if present)
- [ ] (20m) Sanity checks: missing joins, duplicate submission_id, timestamp logic
- [ ] (10m) Save query + export dataset for follow-on analysis

tasks.name: Triage: QSQ adherence analysis (#2) — opportunities + upside + readout
tasks.description:
- [ ] (20m) Identify top 3 opportunity segments (high “quote” rec volume + low adherence)
- [ ] (15m) Separately flag segments with high adherence but low bind (pricing/other signal)
- [ ] (25m) Upside math: assume achievable lift (e.g., +10 pts) → incremental quotes by segment
- [ ] (15m) Document methodological caveats (reassignments, multi-UW, timing window)
- [ ] (15m) Draft concise readout (bullets + 1 table) for report-out

tasks.name: Triage: Lock QSQ metric definitions (quoted window + reassignments)
tasks.description:
- [ ] (15m) Propose “quoted within N days of recommendation” options (e.g., 3/7/14) + tradeoffs
- [ ] (15m) Decide attribution with reassignments / multi-UW (first assignee vs final actor vs both)
- [ ] (15m) Write final definitions into analysis notes so the metric is repeatable

tasks.name: Triage: Bulk classification pull — get Kajol query + run/validate + readout
tasks.description:
- [ ] (10m) Request Kajol’s query link + where it should be run
- [ ] (30m) Run query + export dataset
- [ ] (20m) Validate row counts, null rates, obvious misclassifications
- [ ] (20m) Quick segmentation: volumes + error rates by program/state/size proxy
- [ ] (10m) Write 5-bullet readout + follow-up questions

tasks.name: Triage: UW controls designs kickoff — artifacts + Arjun alignment + summary
tasks.description:
- [ ] (10m) Ask Katie for existing design artifacts + links (Figma / docs)
- [ ] (15m) Review artifacts for driver review + MVR review failure mode relevance
- [ ] (25m) Send Arjun tight framing: failure modes + desired control behaviors
- [ ] (20m) Propose working session agenda (decisions needed from design)
- [ ] (20m) Summarize decisions/next steps in writing

tasks.name: Triage: MVR PRDs by failure mode (#1) — outline + initial drafts
tasks.description:
- [ ] (20m) List failure modes to cover (from war room notes + taxonomy)
- [ ] (20m) Create PRD skeleton: current → desired → metrics/detection → owner → status
- [ ] (40m) Draft 2–3 highest-impact failure mode sections
- [ ] (20m) Add placeholders for open questions + dependencies

tasks.name: Triage: MVR PRDs by failure mode (#2) — complete + consistency + share
tasks.description:
- [ ] (60m) Complete remaining failure mode sections
- [ ] (20m) Consistency pass: naming, metrics definitions, ownership/status fields
- [ ] (20m) Add short top summary: top failure modes + current gaps + next actions
- [ ] (20m) Share draft links for async feedback

tasks.name: Triage: DS operating cadence doc + message to Alex
tasks.description:
- [ ] (20m) Write operating cadence proposal: recurring touchpoints, owners, inputs/outputs, escalation
- [ ] (15m) Add “what didn’t go well”: concrete examples + impact (factual)
- [ ] (10m) Propose next-step asks (weekly review, DoD, backfill expectations)
- [ ] (15m) Send Alex a concise message + link to cadence doc
